privileged_info_summary: The genealogy manuscript indexing task uses synthetically generated data. All metadata claims are verified: (1) The input manuscript is created as an ODT file containing a fictional narrative about the Holloway family traveling the Oregon Trail in 1842, containing exactly the 10 index terms claimed: Jeremiah Holloway, Martha Holloway, Cumberland Gap, Oxen, Fort Laramie, Independence Rock, Chimney Rock, Oregon Trail, Cholera, and Wagon. (2) The terms list is a JSON array containing these same 10 terms. (3) The output file path, input file path, and terms file path are all correctly specified. (4) The minimum index marks requirement of 8 represents an 80% success threshold (marking at least 8 of 10 terms). All verification of terms in both the setup script and export/verifier scripts confirms consistency and correctness.
